_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: we observed a remarkable and significant therapeutic improvement when Brd4 knockdown was combined with JQ1...Even at 15 days post-treatment, over half of the tumors in the JQ1 plus shBrd4 group exhibited greater than 30% tumor regression
details: Remarkable and significant therapeutic improvement when Brd4 knockdown was combined with JQ1, with over half of tumors showing greater than 30% tumor regression at 15 days
